questions.html: Type the operator that means: Greater than
Type the operator that means: Less than
Type the operator that means: Equal to
questions.notice: == means equal to — use double equals to compare, single = is for assignment

questions.html: Type the operator that means: Not equal to
Type the operator that means: Greater than or equal to
questions.notice: >= means greater than or equal to

questions.html: Type the operator that means: Less than or equal to
questions.notice: <= means less than or equal to

questions.html: Type the operator that means: Is exactly the same as
questions.notice: == means is exactly the same as — don't confuse it with = which assigns a value

questions.html: Type the operator that means: Does not equal
questions.notice: != means does not equal — the ! means 'not'
